dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires detecting 'extreme MACD readings sustained for extended period' and 'new trend high/low'. Translated as: MACD crossing signal line (indicating extreme readings) combined with price making new highs/lows (prev_high/prev_low) and strong trend confirmation (ADX > 25). Entry conditions detect trend-continuation setups. Exit conditions trigger on MACD mean-reversion signal or price reversal. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction allows both long and short entries based on trend direction. Position size parameter left unspecified as source does not provide concrete threshold.

Translated as: MACD crossing signal line (indicating extreme readings) combined with price making new highs/lows (prev_high/prev_low) and strong trend confirmation (ADX > 25). Entry conditions detect trend-continuation setups. Exit conditions trigger on MACD mean-reversion signal or price reversal. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction allows both long and short entries based on trend direction. Position size parameter left unspecified as source does not provide concrete threshold.

source_rule_text: Do not fade extreme MACD readings during strong trends; sustained extreme indicator readings reflect conviction behind price movement and should trigger trend-continuation trades, not mean-reversion trades.
